name: o9k
description: its-over-9k — meta-framework combining token-efficiency frameworks (output compression, context discipline, subagent isolation, memory MCP) for Claude Code.

plugins.name: o9k-core
plugins.description: The o9k doctrine: efficiency rules of engagement and the arbitration layer that keeps all other efficiency plugins from colliding. Zero-effort: a SessionStart hook activates everything automatically; /o9k-guide explains the rest. Install this first.

plugins.name: o9k-caveman
plugins.description: Output compression: telegraphic response style with lite/full/ultra levels and automatic fallback to full prose for safety-critical content. Adapted from JuliusBrussee/caveman (MIT).

plugins.name: o9k-scout
plugins.description: Context discipline: load structure before files, search before read, one canonical repo map per session.

plugins.name: o9k-dispatch
plugins.description: Cost-gated subagent fan-out: isolate searches and decomposable work in subagents that return results, not transcripts.

plugins.name: o9k-memory
plugins.description: Persistent memory integration: session-start briefing, on-demand recall, save-before-compact. Uses the hmem memory MCP by default; auto-detects and prefers TIM once it ships.

plugins.name: o9k-recon
plugins.description: Discovery & onboarding: a GitHub Scout skill (framework-scout) for finding new agent frameworks and classifying them symbiotic/orthogonal/blocking, plus one-command companion bundle installs (companion-bundles).
